steps.title: Identify the initial value
steps.content: The condo is currently worth $186{,}000$, so an exponential model must start with $186{,}000$ when $x=0$.

steps.title: Convert percent growth
steps.content:
A $3.1\%$ yearly increase means the value is multiplied by
$$
1+0.031=1.031
$$
each year.

steps.title: Build the growth function
steps.content: After $x$ years, the function is $$ f(x)=186{,}000(1.031)^x $$ The answer is C.
